title: centaurea uniflora var. ambigua
intro: Centaurea uniflora var. ambigua is a variety of the Centaurea uniflora plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. This plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Centaurea uniflora var. ambigua typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments.
